Replace extracted obfuscation/formatting classes with the `poor-plebs/guzzle-obfuscated-formatter` package.

### Changed

- Added `poor-plebs/guzzle-obfuscated-formatter: ^1.0.1` as a dependency
- Updated namespace imports from `PoorPlebs\TelegramBotSdk\GuzzleHttp\*` and `PoorPlebs\TelegramBotSdk\Obfuscator\{ObfuscatorInterface,StringObfuscator}` to their `PoorPlebs\GuzzleObfuscatedFormatter\*` equivalents

### Removed

- `src/GuzzleHttp/ObfuscatedMessageFormatter.php`
- `src/GuzzleHttp/Psr7/Message.php`
- `src/GuzzleHttp/Psr7/Uri.php`
- `src/Obfuscator/ObfuscatorInterface.php`
- `src/Obfuscator/StringObfuscator.php`
- Associated test files
